title: Longest Substring Without Repeating Characters
description: Return the length of the longest substring of `s` that contains no repeated character. A substring must be contiguous.

parameters.name: s
parameters.description: Input string in which you need to find the longest window without duplicates.

returns.description: The maximum length of a contiguous substring without repetition.

constraints: `s` may contain letters, digits, symbols, or spaces
The target substring must be contiguous

examples.title: Example 2
examples.explanation: The only longest valid substring is `b`.

examples.title: Example 3
examples.explanation: `wke` is valid, but `pwke` is not contiguous.
